_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Modern development standards involves using the latest technologies and best practices to improve the quality of the software development process.
reference_document_element_description: Define and enforce model development standards, including documentation requirements, testing protocols, approval gates, ongoing monitoring expectations, and the criteria for model retirement or replacement.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-T-004 (DQ, cosine: 0.504), DA-T-004 (DA, cosine: 0.480).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.5/10 (raw 0.354). Shared vocabulary: [development, standards]. DDaT-only terms [best, improve, involves, latest, modern, practices] vs WIDAI-only terms [approval, criteria, define, documentation, enforce, expectations] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.882, R=0.853). P exceeds R by 0.029 — the DDaT element's 20 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DDaT element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.2%, N:58.4%, C:41.4%). No dominant classification for "Modern development standards involves using the latest technologies and best pra" vs "Define and enforce model development standards, including documentation requirem" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.515 > STS 0.354 (gap +0.160). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [development, standards] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.4%. Shared tokens: [development, standards]. DDaT-only: [best, improve, involves, latest, modern, practices]. WIDAI-only: [approval, criteria, define, documentation, enforce, expectations].
